_source: A 'Kasten' bundle that names Coca-Cola + sibling brands but gives NO per-bottle size or count ('Coca-Cola oder Fanta/Sprite Kasten versch. Sorten'). Could be a 1-litre case or a 0,5L/1,25L Kasten — genuinely ambiguous, so surface flagged (needsReview, D-08) rather than guess. 'versch. Sorten' (flavors) must NOT by itself demote a confirmable case.
description: Coca-Cola oder Fanta/Sprite Kasten versch. Sorten zzgl. Pfand 9,99 €
